You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr.Rachna Navalakhe is currently working as an Associate Professor and Head in the Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science (SGSITS), Indore (Madhya Pradesh). She has done B.Sc. from Satya Sai College, Bhopal in 1996, M.Sc. in Mathematics from M.L.B College Bhopal in 1998, M.Phil. from Devi AhilyaVishwavidyalaya, Indore in 1999. She has completed her Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics from DAVV Indore in 2014. She has more than 23 years of teaching experience. She has published nearly 42 research papers, 4 Book chapters, one Book, 3 Indian patent and presented many research papers in various National and International Conferences. She is a member of several professional bodies and reviewer of various Journals. She has delivered expert lectures in various institute. Her present area of research includes Fuzzy Topology, Fuzzy Logic and its Application, Cryptography and Coding Theory. Recently, she has received prestigious Dasgupta award for best teacher in the Associate Professor category 2024. A research project entitled Prediction of various health diseases in rural area of Madhya Pradesh using Fuzzy Logic based Medical Expert System has been sanctioned to Dr. Navalakhe by the Madhya Pradesh Council of Science & Technology (MPCST) in 2025.
